Evening AI tip 💡 Overthinking prompts? Use this formula:

[Role] + [Task] + [Format] + [Constraint]

Ex: 'Act as a copywriter. Describe noise-canceling earbuds. Bullet points. Under 80 words.'

Cleaner input = better output every time ✅ #AITools #SideHustle
